steps: Go to https://app.lemonsqueezy.com/ and log in or create a free account
Navigate to 'Settings' > 'API' in the left sidebar
Click '+ Add token' to create a new API key
Enter a descriptive name for the token (names cannot be changed later)
Copy the API key shown — it will not be displayed again
Use the key as a Bearer token: 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Lemon Squeezy API token from Settings > API

notes: Free account available; no credit card required to sign up
The API key is shown only once after creation — copy it immediately
Lemon Squeezy supports both test mode and live mode; your API key works for both
The API follows JSON:API specification — responses include 'data', 'relationships', and 'included' fields
Multiple API keys can be created and revoked individually from the Settings > API page

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's account information
